orphanedMiniApps.name: CREDS
issues: Standalone dry-run credential attestation route. README explicitly states mock metadata and no production integrations yet.

orphanedMiniApps.name: Documentation Copilot
issues: Repo-owned docs assistant, not lesson-bound. Uses API proxy rather than a curriculum mapping layer.

orphanedMiniApps.name: Notebook
issues: Profile notebook persists to localStorage under pioneer_* keys and is not linked to lesson artifacts.

orphanedMiniApps.name: OnboardingChat
issues: Global onboarding flow is not connected to module, section, or lesson IDs.

missingMiniAppOpportunities.title: 1.21 Capstone - Integrated Application
missingMiniAppOpportunities.reason: Lesson content is present but no interactive component is bound to it in repo data.

missingMiniAppOpportunities.title: 3.11 Build The Omni Studio (Implementation)
missingMiniAppOpportunities.reason: Lesson content is present but no interactive component is bound to it in repo data.

webLLMFeatures.name: WebLLM Provider
webLLMFeatures.notes: Initializes Qwen2-0.5B local browser inference, checks WebGPU support, and exposes progress/error state.

webLLMFeatures.name: runProgramAI
webLLMFeatures.notes: Routes program tasks to WebLLM when available, otherwise returns template fallback responses.

webLLMFeatures.name: LocalAIStatusCard
webLLMFeatures.notes: Handles unsupported-browser messaging and fallback affordance for local AI activities.

webLLMFeatures.name: PromptArchitectWorkbench
webLLMFeatures.notes: Uses WebLLM/template for critique and the API proxy for image generation.

webLLMFeatures.name: GeminiChat Widgets
webLLMFeatures.notes: Module-wide floating assistants call the shared proxy client but are not lesson-specific.

webLLMFeatures.name: Documentation Copilot
webLLMFeatures.notes: Grounded answer flow over repo-owned docs; context comes from vanguardDocs data, not Notion.

mergeBlockers: Curriculum structure is not normalized to a clean 4-module x 2-section model. Modules 1-3 include extra top-level wrappers outside the target section map.
No Notion sync or mapping layer exists in repo. All discovered Vanguard lesson copy remains hardcoded in curriculumData.ts files.
Progress math is inconsistent. Dashboard totals use configured counts (50/40/40/60) while actual trackable section counts are 38/27/25/24.
The repo ships a large orphan surface: 200 unused module-specific interactive file entries across 75 unique names, plus standalone tools not tied to lessons.
AI runtime ownership is split across WebLLM, template fallbacks, and an API proxy without a lesson-to-runtime manifest.
CREDS is still a dry-run credential attestation workbench and is not merge-ready as live credential evidence infrastructure.
Module 4 SectionRenderer borrows interactive components from Module 2 for some experiences, which weakens ownership boundaries for an Arsenal merge.
Vanguard profile and notebook surfaces still carry Pioneer naming/storage conventions, indicating program-boundary drift.
recommendedNextActions: Create a canonical Notion-to-repo manifest keyed by programId/moduleId/sectionId/lessonId/miniAppId before any Arsenal merge work.
Normalize Modules 1-3 into exactly two mergeable sections each, and move overview/deliverables content into typed metadata or preface records.
Reconcile dashboard progress totals with discovered section counts, then re-run badge and certificate logic against the normalized model.
Prune or explicitly map orphaned interactive components before handing the merge to Lovable.
Define one AI runtime contract per lesson mini-app: api, webllm, simulated-ai, or local-logic, with required fallbacks and completion semantics.
